segments.speaker: 题目13/14
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. Did you visit the amusement park during spring break? I did. The grounds were clean and the rides were fun, but I had to wait in line for half an hour just to be told they had run out of ice cream. That last part wasn't my experience. I did hear they hired a new vendor to run concessions this year though. Actually, the entire park is under new management. Give them some time to get settled in. There's an adjustment period.
